door: The tide has gone out of the old reliquary, leaving its lower halls drowned in still black water.. Chinese ink-wash (shuimo) painting on deep indigo night paper, minimal and atmospheric, cool moonlit blues with a single warm metallic-gold accent, wuxia fantasy. wide cinematic banner, lots of negative space, no text
guardroom: a flooded stone guardroom, a corroded bronze automaton with a halberd grinding upright in waist-deep black water. Chinese ink-wash (shuimo) painting on deep indigo night paper, minimal and atmospheric, cool moonlit blues with a single warm metallic-gold accent, wuxia fantasy. wide cinematic banner, lots of negative space, no text
vault: the drowned inner vault, a vast Warden of living brine rising from a black-mirror dais under a ceiling of dead lockers.
